description: Synthesized repair of core-lite-intake.yml: fixes inline Python heredoc causing YAML parse failure, fixes pipe corruption of JSONL disposition records, quotes 'on:' key to prevent boolean coercion, and adds per-payload pipeline log redirection. Preserves all inputs, triggers, job structure, and governance layer.

files.content:
name: core-lite-intake

"on":
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      task_id:
        description: "Task ID (leave blank for default intake run)"
        required: false
        default: ""
      skip_tasks:
        description: "Skip declared task loop (true/false)"
        required: false
        default: "true"
      stage_override:
        description: "Override active stage (leave blank for current)"
        required: false
        default: ""
      repair_target:
        description: "Repair target repo (e.g. Data-Continuation/core-lite)"
        required: false
        default: ""
      input_type:
        description: "Multimodal input type (text/voice/image/screenshot/document/structured_data/llm_output/bundle)"
        required: false
        default: ""
      input_path:
        description: "Path to input file or manifest (relative to repo root)"
        required: false
        default: ""
      kv_packet:
        description: "KnowledgeVault context packet path"
        required: false
        default: ""
      dry_run:
        description: "Dry run only — no mutations (true/false)"
        required: false
        default: "false"
      agent_provider:
        description: "Governed LLM collaboration provider for task.md: none/openai/claude/both"
        required: false
        default: "none"

  push:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - "incoming/**"

permissions:
  contents: write
  actions: read

env:
  STEGVERSE_ENTITY: StegVerse-002
  STEGVERSE_REPO: StegVerse-002/core-lite
  STEGVERSE_VERSION: 1.0.1-sv002-output-authority
  GOVERNED_LLM_LLM_VERSION: 0.1.3-gllm
  OPENAI_MODEL: ${{ vars.OPENAI_MODEL || 'gpt-4o' }}
  AGENT_PROVIDER: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && inputs.agent_provider || 'none' }}

jobs:
  workflow-summary:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: always()
    steps:
      - name: Write route summary
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          EVENT="${{ github.event_name }}"
          TASK_ID="${{ inputs.task_id }}"
          INPUT_TYPE="${{ inputs.input_type }}"
          INPUT_PATH="${{ inputs.input_path }}"
          AGENT_PROVIDER="${AGENT_PROVIDER:-none}"
          DRY_RUN="${{ inputs.dry_run }}"
          STAGE="${{ inputs.stage_override }}"

          if [ "${EVENT}" = "push" ]; then
            INPUT_TYPE="incoming-disposition-gate-no-mass-cleanup"
            INPUT_PATH="incoming/** changed in this push, excluding incoming/README.md"
            AGENT_PROVIDER="none"
            DRY_RUN="false"
          fi

          if [ -z "${STAGE}" ]; then STAGE="SV002-M11"; fi
          if [ -z "${DRY_RUN}" ]; then DRY_RUN="false"; fi
          if [ -z "${AGENT_PROVIDER}" ]; then AGENT_PROVIDER="none"; fi

          ROUTE="default/no-op"
          EXPECTED="No declared bundle or LLM provider route selected."
          if [ "${EVENT}" = "push" ]; then
            ROUTE="declared-input-route(push:incoming-disposition-gate-no-mass-cleanup)"
            EXPECTED="Evaluate changed incoming payloads only; remove only those payloads with disposition records; inventory legacy incoming files without deleting them."
          elif [ "${AGENT_PROVIDER}" != "none" ]; then
            ROUTE="llm-collaboration(${AGENT_PROVIDER})"
            EXPECTED="Run selected LLM provider path, sandbox candidate packets, gate admissible candidates, and commit coordination evidence."
          elif [ -n "${INPUT_TYPE}" ] || [ -n "${INPUT_PATH}" ]; then
            ROUTE="declared-input-route"
            EXPECTED="Validate input_type/input_path, process bundle/input, commit installed outputs."
          elif [ -n "${TASK_ID}" ]; then
            ROUTE="declared-task-route"
            EXPECTED="Run the declared task, enforce the expected file shape, and commit outputs."
          fi

          {
            echo "## StegVerse Core-Lite Intake — Route Summary"
            echo
            echo "| Field | Value |"
            echo "|---|---|"
            echo "| event | ${EVENT} |"
            echo "| route | ${ROUTE} |"
            echo "| expected behavior | ${EXPECTED} |"
            echo "| task_id | ${TASK_ID:-[blank]} |"
            echo "| input_type | ${INPUT_TYPE:-[blank]} |"
            echo "| input_path | ${INPUT_PATH:-[blank]} |"
            echo "| stage | ${STAGE} |"
            echo "| dry_run | ${DRY_RUN:-false} |"
            echo "| agent_provider | ${AGENT_PROVIDER:-none} |"
          } >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"

  declared-input-route:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' || (github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && inputs.agent_provider == 'none' && (inputs.input_type != '' || inputs.input_path != '')) }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 2

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.11"

      - name: Resolve declared input route
        id: resolve-input
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          mkdir -p reports/current receipts/current tracking/ingestion_events tracking/incoming_mailbox dist/run_artifacts quarantine/incoming

          EVENT="${{ github.event_name }}"
          INPUT_TYPE="${{ inputs.input_type }}"
          INPUT_PATH="${{ inputs.input_path }}"
          STAGE="${{ inputs.stage_override }}"
          DRY_RUN="${{ inputs.dry_run }}"

          if [ -z "${STAGE}" ]; then STAGE="SV002-M11"; fi
          if [ -z "${DRY_RUN}" ]; then DRY_RUN="false"; fi

          : > reports/current/incoming_changed_files.txt
          : > reports/current/incoming_legacy_inventory.txt

          if [ "${EVENT}" = "push" ]; then
            BEFORE="${{ github.event.before }}"
            AFTER="${{ github.sha }}"

            if [ -n "${BEFORE}" ] && [ "${BEFORE}" != "0000000000000000000000000000000000000000" ]; then
              git diff --name-only "${BEFORE}" "${AFTER}" -- incoming/ | sort | while read -r changed; do
                if [ -f "${changed}" ] && [ "${changed}" != "incoming/README.md" ]; then
                  echo "${changed}"
                fi
              done > reports/current/incoming_changed_files.txt
            else
              git diff-tree --no-commit-id --name-only -r "${AFTER}" -- incoming/ | sort | while read -r changed; do
                if [ -f "${changed}" ] && [ "${changed}" != "incoming/README.md" ]; then
                  echo "${changed}"
                fi
              done > reports/current/incoming_changed_files.txt
            fi

            if [ -s reports/current/incoming_changed_files.txt ]; then
              find incoming -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 2 -type f ! -path "incoming/README.md" | sort | grep -vxF -f reports/current/incoming_changed_files.txt > reports/current/incoming_legacy_inventory.txt || true
            else
              find incoming -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 2 -type f ! -path "incoming/README.md" | sort > reports/current/incoming_legacy_inventory.txt || true
            fi

            INPUT_TYPE="push_incoming_disposition_gate_no_mass_cleanup"
            INPUT_PATH="@reports/current/incoming_changed_files.txt"
            DRY_RUN="false"
          else
            if [ -z "${INPUT_TYPE}" ]; then echo "::error::input_type is blank"; exit 1; fi
            if [ -z "${INPUT_PATH}" ]; then echo "::error::input_path is blank"; exit 1; fi
            if [ ! -f "${INPUT_PATH}" ]; then
              echo "::error::Declared input path does not exist: ${INPUT_PATH}"
              find incoming -maxdepth 2 -type f 2>/dev/null | sort || true
              exit 1
            fi
            echo "${INPUT_PATH}" > reports/current/incoming_changed_files.txt
            find incoming -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 2 -type f ! -path "incoming/README.md" | sort | grep -vxF -f reports/current/incoming_changed_files.txt > reports/current/incoming_legacy_inventory.txt || true
          fi

          {
            echo "input_type=${INPUT_TYPE}"
            echo "input_path=${INPUT_PATH}"
            echo "stage=${STAGE}"
            echo "dry_run=${DRY_RUN}"
          } >> "${GITHUB_OUTPUT}"

          {
            echo "## Declared Input Route — Resolved Input"
            echo
            echo "| Field | Value |"
            echo "|---|---|"
            echo "| event | ${EVENT} |"
            echo "| route_mode | ${INPUT_TYPE} |"
            echo "| input_path | ${INPUT_PATH} |"
            echo "| stage | ${STAGE} |"
            echo "| dry_run | ${DRY_RUN} |"
            echo
            echo "### Changed incoming payloads selected for this run"
            echo
            if [ -s reports/current/incoming_changed_files.txt ]; then
              sed 's/^/- /' reports/current/incoming_changed_files.txt
            else
              echo "- none"
            fi
            echo
            echo "### Legacy incoming payloads inventoried, not deleted"
            echo
            if [ -s reports/current/incoming_legacy_inventory.txt ]; then
              sed 's/^/- /' reports/current/incoming_legacy_inventory.txt
            else
              echo "- none"
            fi
          } >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"

      - name: Process incoming payloads through disposition gate
        id: disposition-gate
        env:
          STAGE_REF: ${{ steps.resolve-input.outputs.stage }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          mkdir -p reports/current receipts/current tracking/incoming_mailbox quarantine/incoming dist/run_artifacts
          : > reports/current/incoming_disposition_summary.jsonl
          : > receipts/current/incoming_disposition_receipt.jsonl
          : > reports/current/incoming_disposition_processed_files.txt

          DRY_RUN_ARG=""
          if [ "${{ steps.resolve-input.outputs.dry_run }}" = "true" ]; then DRY_RUN_ARG="--dry-run"; fi

          if [ ! -s reports/current/incoming_changed_files.txt ]; then
            echo "No changed incoming payloads selected; skipping processing."
            exit 0
          fi

          RUN_FAILED=0

          while IFS= read -r INPUT_PATH; do
            [ -n "${INPUT_PATH}" ] || continue
            [ "${INPUT_PATH}" != "incoming/README.md" ] || continue
            [ -f "${INPUT_PATH}" ] || continue

            SHA="$(sha256sum "${INPUT_PATH}" | awk '{print $1}')"
            SHORT_SHA="$(printf "%s" "${SHA}" | cut -c1-16)"
            BASE="$(basename "${INPUT_PATH}")"
            EVENT_DIR="tracking/incoming_mailbox/${SHORT_SHA}"
            STAGED_PAYLOAD="${EVENT_DIR}/${BASE}"
            PIPELINE_LOG="${EVENT_DIR}/pipeline.log"
            mkdir -p "${EVENT_DIR}"

            cp "${INPUT_PATH}" "${STAGED_PAYLOAD}"

            case "${INPUT_PATH}" in
              *.zip) INFERRED_TYPE="bundle" ;;
              *.json|*.jsonl|*.yml|*.yaml) INFERRED_TYPE="structured_data" ;;
              *.md|*.txt) INFERRED_TYPE="document" ;;
              *) INFERRED_TYPE="document" ;;
            esac

            STATUS="UNKNOWN"
            DISPOSITION="UNKNOWN"
            REASON=""

            set +e
            python -m core_lite.multimodal.pipeline --repo-root . --input-type "${INFERRED_TYPE}" --input-path "${STAGED_PAYLOAD}" --entity "${STEGVERSE_ENTITY}" --stage "${STAGE_REF}" ${DRY_RUN_ARG} > "${PIPELINE_LOG}" 2>&1
            EXIT_CODE=$?
            set -e

            if [ "${EXIT_CODE}" -eq 0 ]; then
              STATUS="EVALUATED"
              DISPOSITION="INSTALLED_OR_ACCEPTED"
              REASON="pipeline exited 0; payload staged, recorded, and eligible for removal from incoming"
            else
              STATUS="EVALUATED"
              DISPOSITION="QUARANTINED"
              REASON="pipeline exited ${EXIT_CODE}; payload copied to quarantine before removal from incoming"
              mkdir -p "quarantine/incoming/${SHORT_SHA}"
              cp "${STAGED_PAYLOAD}" "quarantine/incoming/${SHORT_SHA}/${BASE}"
              RUN_FAILED=1
            fi

            export INPUT_PATH STAGED_PAYLOAD SHA INFERRED_TYPE STATUS DISPOSITION REASON EXIT_CODE STAGE_REF
            RECORD="$(python3 -c "import os, json, datetime; print(json.dumps({'schema': 'stegverse.incoming_disposition.v1', 'timestamp_utc': datetime.datetime.now(datetime.timezone.utc).isoformat(), 'stage': os.environ.get('STAGE_REF', ''), 'source_path': os.environ['INPUT_PATH'], 'staged_payload': os.environ['STAGED_PAYLOAD'], 'sha256': os.environ['SHA'], 'input_type': os.environ['INFERRED_TYPE'], 'status': os.environ['STATUS'], 'disposition': os.environ['DISPOSITION'], 'reason': os.environ['REASON'], 'pipeline_exit_code': int(os.environ.get('EXIT_CODE', '0') or '0')}, sort_keys=True))")"

            printf '%s\n' "${RECORD}" >> reports/current/incoming_disposition_summary.jsonl
            printf '%s\n' "${RECORD}" >> receipts/current/incoming_disposition_receipt.jsonl
            echo "${INPUT_PATH}" >> reports/current/incoming_disposition_processed_files.txt
          done < reports/current/incoming_changed_files.txt

          echo "${RUN_FAILED}" > reports/current/incoming_disposition_exit_code.txt

          if [ "${RUN_FAILED}" -ne 0 ]; then
            echo "::warning::One or more changed incoming payloads were quarantined after evaluation."
          fi

      - name: Cleanup only dispositioned changed incoming payloads
        if: always()
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          mkdir -p incoming reports/current
          if [ ! -f incoming/README.md ]; then
            cat > incoming/README.md <<'EOF'
          # Incoming

          Ephemeral ingestion mailbox.

          Only README.md should remain in this directory after ingestion runs.

          Payload bundles/files may be pushed here to activate ingestion, but the workflow removes only payloads with disposition records. Durable evidence belongs in reports, receipts, tracking, quarantine, and dist, not in incoming.
          EOF
          fi

          : > reports/current/incoming_cleanup_candidates.txt

          if [ -s reports/current/incoming_disposition_processed_files.txt ]; then
            while IFS= read -r path; do
              [ -n "${path}" ] || continue
              [ "${path}" != "incoming/README.md" ] || continue
              if [ -f "${path}" ]; then
                echo "${path}" >> reports/current/incoming_cleanup_candidates.txt
                git rm -f --ignore-unmatch "${path}" || rm -f "${path}" || true
              fi
            done < reports/current/incoming_disposition_processed_files.txt
          fi

          echo "## Incoming Mailbox Cleanup" >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
          echo >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
          if [ -s reports/current/incoming_cleanup_candidates.txt ]; then
            echo "Removed only changed incoming payloads with disposition records:" >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
            sed 's/^/- /' reports/current/incoming_cleanup_candidates.txt >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
          else
            echo "- No dispositioned changed incoming payloads were removed." >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
          fi

          if [ -s reports/current/incoming_legacy_inventory.txt ]; then
            echo >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
            echo "Legacy incoming payloads were inventoried but intentionally left in place:" >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
            sed 's/^/- /' reports/current/incoming_legacy_inventory.txt >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
          fi

      - name: Summarize declared input result
        if: always()
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "## Declared Input Route — Result" >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
          echo >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
          echo "### Changed incoming payloads" >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
          if [ -s reports/current/incoming_changed_files.txt ]; then
            sed 's/^/- /' reports/current/incoming_changed_files.txt >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}" || true
          else
            echo "- none" >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
          fi
          echo >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
          echo "### Dispositions" >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
          if [ -s reports/current/incoming_disposition_summary.jsonl ]; then
            cat reports/current/incoming_disposition_summary.jsonl >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
          else
            echo "- none" >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
          fi
          echo >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
          if [ -f reports/current/bundle_ingest_report.json ]; then
            python -m json.tool reports/current/bundle_ingest_report.json >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}" || true
          else
            echo "- bundle_ingest_report.json missing" >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
          fi

      - name: Commit declared input outputs and dispositioned cleanup
        if: ${{ steps.resolve-input.outputs.dry_run != 'true' && always() }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          git config user.name "StegVerse-002 Declared Input Router"
          git config user.email "sv002-declared-input-router@stegverse"
          git add -A incoming/ .github/workflows/ core_lite/ scripts/ schemas/ examples/ docs/ tests/ tools/ config/ machine/ outputs/ reports/current/ receipts/current/ tracking/ quarantine/ dist/ agent_history/ vault_template/ iosnoperiod/ MANUAL_INSTALL.md iosnoperiod.md bundle_manifest.json || true
          if git diff --staged --quiet; then
            echo "- No declared input, disposition, or allowed incoming cleanup changes were staged for commit." >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
          else
            FIRST_INPUT="$(head -n 1 reports/current/incoming_changed_files.txt 2>/dev/null || echo incoming-disposition)"
            git commit -m "sv002: process incoming disposition — ${FIRST_INPUT}"
            git push
            echo "- Declared input outputs, disposition records, and allowed incoming cleanup committed and pushed." >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
          fi

      - name: Upload declared input evidence
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: declared-input-route-evidence
          path: |
            reports/current/
            receipts/current/
            tracking/
            quarantine/
            dist/
          if-no-files-found: warn

  declared-task-route:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && inputs.agent_provider == 'none' && inputs.task_id != '' && inputs.input_type == '' && inputs.input_path == '' }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.11"
      - name: Execute declared task
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          mkdir -p outputs reports/current receipts/current tracking/task_runs dist/run_artifacts
          STAGE="${{ inputs.stage_override }}"
          if [ -z "${STAGE}" ]; then STAGE="SV002-M11"; fi
          DRY_RUN_ARG=""
          if [ "${{ inputs.dry_run }}" = "true" ]; then DRY_RUN_ARG="--dry-run"; fi

          set +e
          python -m tools.scripts.task_dispatcher --task-id "${{ inputs.task_id }}" --task-catalog tools/tasks/task_catalog.json --entity "${STEGVERSE_ENTITY}" --stage "${STAGE}" ${DRY_RUN_ARG} > reports/current/task_dispatcher_result.json 2> reports/current/task_dispatcher_stderr.txt
          TASK_EXIT=$?
          set -e

          echo "${TASK_EXIT}" > reports/current/task_dispatcher_exit_code.txt
          if [ "${TASK_EXIT}" -ne 0 ]; then
            echo "::error::Declared task failed with exit code ${TASK_EXIT}."
            cat reports/current/task_dispatcher_result.json || true
            cat reports/current/task_dispatcher_stderr.txt || true
            exit "${TASK_EXIT}"
          fi
      - name: Commit declared task outputs
        if: ${{ inputs.dry_run != 'true' && success() }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          git config user.name "StegVerse-002 Task Dispatcher"
          git config user.email "sv002-task-dispatcher@stegverse"
          git add -A outputs/ reports/current/ receipts/current/ tracking/ dist/ agent_history/ || true
          if git diff --staged --quiet; then
            echo "- Declared task produced no changes to commit." >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
            echo "::warning::Declared task produced no changes to commit."
          else
            git commit -m "sv002: run declared task — ${{ inputs.task_id }}"
            git push
            echo "- Declared task outputs committed and pushed." >> "${GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY}"
          fi
      - name: Upload declared task evidence
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: declared-task-route-evidence
          path: |
            outputs/
            reports/current/
            receipts/current/
            tracking/
            dist/
          if-no-files-found: warn

  claude-agent:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && (inputs.agent_provider == 'claude' || inputs.agent_provider == 'both') }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Run Claude Code propose-only task
        env:
          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p outputs reports/current receipts/current
          if [ ! -f task.md ]; then
            cat > outputs/claude_response.md <<'EOF'
          # Claude Code — Skipped

          No task.md was present. No Claude proposal was generated.
          EOF
            exit 0
          fi
          if [ -z "${ANTHROPIC_API_KEY}" ]; then
            cat > outputs/claude_response.md <<'EOF'
          # Claude Code — Skipped

          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is not configured. Claude proposal was not generated.
          EOF
            exit 0
          fi
          npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
          {
            echo "# Claude Code — Governed Collaboration Proposal"
            echo
            echo "Run timestamp: $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")"
            echo
            echo "Governance mode: propose-only"
            echo
            echo "Capability version: ${GOVERNED_LLM_LLM_VERSION}"
            echo
            echo "Task source: task.md"
            echo
            echo "Directive: no broad authority is ever admissible under Transition Table, AE, or GCAT/BCAT enforcement."
            echo
            echo "---"
            echo
          } > outputs/claude_response.md
          claude -p "$(cat task.md)" >> outputs/claude_response.md 2>&1 || true
          cat > reports/current/claude_task_summary.json <<JSON
          {
            "schema": "stegverse.claude_task_summary.v1",
            "version": "${GOVERNED_LLM_LLM_VERSION}",
            "provider": "claude",
            "status": "completed",
            "mode": "propose_only",
            "output_path": "outputs/claude_response.md",
            "authority": "candidate_evidence_only"
          }
          JSON
      - name: Upload Claude output
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: claude-response
          path: |
            outputs/claude_response.md
            reports/current/claude_task_summary.json
          if-no-files-found: warn

  openai-agent:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && (inputs.agent_provider == 'openai' || inputs.agent_provider == 'both') }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.11"
      - name: Run OpenAI propose-only task
        env:
          OPENAI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.OPENAI_API_KEY }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p outputs reports/current receipts/current
          python scripts/openai_task.py
      - name: Upload OpenAI output
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: openai-response
          path: |
            outputs/chatgpt_response.md
            reports/current/openai_task_summary.json
            receipts/current/openai_task_receipt.jsonl
          if-no-files-found: warn

  merge-and-commit:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [claude-agent, openai-agent]
    if: ${{ always() && github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && (inputs.agent_provider == 'openai' || inputs.agent_provider == 'claude' || inputs.agent_provider == 'both') }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Download Claude output
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        continue-on-error: true
        with:
          name: claude-response
          path: .
      - name: Download OpenAI output
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        continue-on-error: true
        with:
          name: openai-response
          path: .
      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.11"
      - name: Run adapter candidate sandbox executor
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          mkdir -p outputs reports/current receipts/current dist/run_artifacts
          python scripts/adapter_candidate_sandbox.py --repo-root . --apply-if-gate-allows
      - name: Run deterministic synthesis
        run: |
          mkdir -p outputs reports/current receipts/current agent_history
          python scripts/merge_outputs.py
      - name: Compare agent outputs
        run: |
          python tools/agent_governance/agent_compare.py --fail-on-high
      - name: Enforce coordination boundary
        run: |
          python tools/agent_governance/enforce_agent_boundary.py --allowed agent_policy/allowed_paths.json --forbidden agent_policy/forbidden_paths.json --report reports/current/agent_boundary_report.json --receipt receipts/current/agent_boundary_receipt.jsonl
      - name: Record LLM-LLM coordination change
        run: |
          python tools/agent_governance/record_llm_change.py --provider coordinator --conversation current-workflow-run --version "${GOVERNED_LLM_LLM_VERSION}" --change-type coordination_run --summary "Recorded governed LLM-LLM collaboration outputs, adapter candidate sandbox decision, comparison evidence, no-broad-authority directive, and boundary enforcement." --files outputs/thread.md outputs/adapter_candidate_sandbox.md reports/current/adapter_candidate_sandbox_report.json reports/current/agent_coordination_report.json reports/current/agent_comparison_report.json reports/current/agent_boundary_report.json receipts/current/adapter_candidate_sandbox_receipt.jsonl receipts/current/agent_coordination_receipt.jsonl receipts/current/agent_comparison_receipt.jsonl receipts/current/agent_boundary_receipt.jsonl
      - name: Package proposed-transition bundle
        run: |
          python scripts/package_transition_bundle.py
      - name: Commit governed coordination outputs
        run: |
          git config user.name "StegVerse-002 Agent Coordinator"
          git config user.email "sv002-agent-coordinator@stegverse"
          git add -A outputs/ reports/current/ receipts/current/ agent_history/ dist/bundles/ dist/run_artifacts/ docs/ scripts/ schemas/ tests/ tools/ config/ machine/ examples/ || true
          git diff --staged --quiet || git commit -m "sv002: governed transition bundle v0.1.3 — $(head -1 task.md 2>/dev/null || echo no-task)"
          git push || true
